shortDescription.default: SharePoint Pages Suggester - Smart page recommendations for AEQUOS Modern Data Visualizer

longDescription.default: Provides intelligent keyword suggestions from SharePoint Site Pages based on titles, descriptions, and popularity analytics. Features view-count sorting and trending pages display for AEQUOS Modern Data Visualizer.

features.title: SharePoint Pages Suggester Feature
features.description: Activates the SharePoint Pages Suggester Library for AEQUOS Modern Data Visualizer.
